description_long: This ornate sconce features a central stem with elaborate, sculpted detailing and six gracefully curved arms radiating outward, each supporting a cylindrical lampshade. The shades appear to be made of a translucent material, likely frosted or fabric-covered glass, which diffuses the light softly. The arms and central column are crafted from a glossy, possibly glass or crystal material, giving the fixture a luxurious and elegant appearance. Decorative finials and rounded elements accentuate the base of each arm, adding to the classical aesthetic. The sconce is designed to be suspended from the ceiling, with a matching decorative rod and canopy. Its overall style is reminiscent of traditional or vintage chandeliers, suitable for upscale urban interiors or historic public spaces.
description: A luxurious, multi-arm ceiling sconce with six frosted cylindrical shades and ornate glass or crystal detailing, exuding a classic, elegant style.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing all six arms and shades symmetrically arranged around the central stem.
description_view_1: Side view revealing three visible arms and shades, with the central column and decorative rod more prominent.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the full arrangement of arms and shades from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with three arms and shades visible and the central stem in profile.
attribute_fixture_design: The fixture exhibits a vintage, classical chandelier style with ornate glass or crystal arms and decorative finials, evoking a sense of luxury and traditional elegance.
